measured_by: header facts (acquisition.py) + astrometry.net solves (solve_field.py) + Siril findstar/register metrics (frame_metrics.json); this module computes only the derived trail/drift geometry and records it

check.reason: a fixed mount here would smear every sub by ~1625 px; the measured stars could hide at most 2.3 px (findstar roundness 0.8585 / FWHM 3.291 px over 15 frames, ~1957 stars/frame, 15/15 registered) — 713x apart: the mount is tracking. No solve needed.

in_exposure_trail.note: predicted = 15.041 * cos(dec) * exposure / plate_scale — the smear a FIXED mount would put in every sub; no registration removes it

mount_check.reason: declared tracked matches the measured tracked signature — a fixed mount here would smear every sub by ~1625 px; the measured stars could hide at most 2.3 px (findstar roundness 0.8585 / FWHM 3.291 px over 15 frames, ~1957 stars/frame, 15/15 registered) — 713x apart: the mount is tracking. No solve needed.

label: tracked, narrow
route_hint: standard (calibrate -> register -> stack) — tracked mount: no inter-frame drift to fight
